articles.title: SECURITY
articles.summary: If you’re ready to get serious about security and protecting your users from theft, get a Coinspect security audit [4]. → With hundreds of audits [4] conducted since 2014, the Coinspect team knows what to look for - and how to fix it.

articles.title: THE SEC CAN SUE COINBASE FOR OFFERING UNREGISTERED SECURITIES, JUDGE RULES
articles.summary: A US District Judge has ruled that the SEC’s securities lawsuit against Coinbase can proceed, despite the firm’s attempt at getting a dismissal. This decision implies that cryptocurrency transactions could fall under the SEC's jurisdiction, despite Coinbase's objections. The judge dismissed claims against Coinbase's Wallet product, stating the SEC has failed to prove that it acts as a 'broker'.

articles.title: FETCH.AI, OCEAN PROTOCOL, AND SINGULARITYNET UNITE TO CREATE ARTIFICIAL SUPERINTELLIGENCE ALLIANCE
articles.summary: Three major players in the crypto AI space, SingularityNET, Fetch.ai, and Ocean Protocol, have announced a merger to create the ‘Artificial Superintelligence Alliance’, a decentralized AI network. The alliance merges $FET, $OCEAN, and $AGIX tokens into one - $ASI. This groundbreaking move aims to accelerate the path towards Artificial General Intelligence, provide an alternative to Big Tech's AI advancements, and facilitate more ethical AI development and utilization.

articles.title: INTRODUCING INSTANT, 24/7/365 SUBSCRIPTIONS AND REDEMPTIONS; SHIFTING OUSG FUNDS INTO BLACKROCK’S BUIDL
articles.summary: Ondo is launching instant investment and redemption for its OUSG product, bypassing traditional securities settlement times. An additional form of OUSG, described as rOUSG, will maintain a steady mint/redeem price of $1.00, with yields distributed daily. A conversion tool will also facilitate immediate OUSG and rOUSG conversion. Meanwhile, a significant portion of OUSG's assets will be placed into the BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund.

articles.title: OASIS AI: THE FIRST DISTRIBUTED AI INFERENCE PLATFORM
articles.summary: Oasis AI has introduced a distributed AI inference platform enabled by a distinctive browser extension in an attempt to entice a wider user base, irrespective of their technical expertise, to participate in the AI space. The platform facilitates decentralized computing, makes APIs easily accessible, and promotes AI inference at scale. In the upcoming weeks, an extension for providers, an inference platform, and enterprise APIs are expected to be released.

articles.title: DEPIN - A NEW PARADIGM IN CRYPTO
articles.summary: This article gives an overview of the DePIN space, a new sector in cryptocurrency that pertains to Decentralized Physical Infrastructure Networks. After an initial surge in prices, DePIN projects seem primed for promising future growth. The broad category encompasses both physical and digital resources. Its benefits include resource efficiency, lower barriers to entry, and decentralization. This article highlights several DePIN projects, including Filecoin, Helium, and Shadow.

articles.title: WHAT HAPPENS TO ALTCOINS AFTER THE BITCOIN HALVING
articles.summary: The Bitcoin halving is usually a positive catalyst for altcoins and this is expected to be the case again this cycle. While the extent to which this happens as it did in prior cycles is uncertain, it is highly unlikely the market will go into an extended cooldown phase after the halving.

articles.title: THE TOKEN IS THE PRODUCT
articles.summary: Tokenization plays a pivotal role in the distribution strategy for blockchain-based products, often being more significant than the product itself. Founders who focus on attracting attention and liquidity to their tokens can create successful crypto projects and substantial network effects. Examples include Uniswap and the Helium Network, which used tokens to incentivize network participation and subsequently gained great traction because of that.

articles.title: NEW BLACKROCK TOKENIZED FUND GARNERS $160 MILLION IN DEPOSITS
articles.summary: BlackRock's first tokenized investment fund, the BlackRock USD Institutional Digital Liquidity Fund (BUIDL), has attracted $160 million in inflows within the first week of its launch, boosted by contributions from tokenized real-world asset platform, Ondo Finance. The fund, which invests in U.S. Treasury bills, repurchase agreements, and cash, provides dividends to qualified investors in the form of tokens representing U.S. dollar yield.

articles.title: BASE LAUNCHES ERC-20 MIGRATION TOOL
articles.summary: The Base Migration Tool allows users to easily migrate ERC20 tokens to the Base network with a user-friendly interface.

articles.title: TELEGRAM BOT USAGE GROWING
articles.summary: Telegram trading bot volume surged 3x in March to $4.7 billion, with a 1.7x increase in users to 450k, mostly on Solana.

articles.title: BLAST NFT GAME MUNCHABLES RECOVERS $62 MILLION STOLEN IN EXPLOIT
articles.summary: NFT game Munchables, built on Blast, an Ethereum L2 network, experienced an exploit by a North Korean hacker, losing $62 million in the process. The Blast team was able to recover the stolen funds.

articles.title: WEALTH MARKET EYEING 3% ALLOCATION TO BITCOIN, SAYS BITWISE CIO
articles.summary: Bitwise CIO Matt Hougan thinks that "3% is the new 1%" for bitcoin allocations among professional investors, due in part to the institutional legitimacy the spot Bitcoin ETFs bestowed upon the asset class.
